summary: H6 federation/partition slice is active in-repo: partitionId propagation, soak partition drill dimensions, partition operator drill, H5/H6 evidence closeout manifests in validate:all. H5 scale slice is closed in status; H7 runway seeded (h7-action-1..2). Prior horizons H1–H4 remain closed with machine-verified validate:all evidence.

nextActions.summary: Run unified-ci and confirm evidence artifact upload reliability and stage promotion gate signal emission.
Exercise operator retrieval and local verification flow against CI artifact bundle.
Promote H1 to completed once artifact retrieval and stage promotion gate workflow are verified.
Run canary promotion drill with passing readiness gate and capture stage-promotion execution evidence.
Run majority promotion readiness drill and confirm policy gate behavior under threshold breaches.
Validate rollback-trigger policy flow by simulating sustained SLO gate violation and proving Eve-safe restoration.
Run unified stage drill command for canary and majority paths so promotion and rollback policy evidence are emitted in one operation.
Run consolidated H2 drill suite command that emits canary hold, majority hold, and rollback-simulation evidence in a single report.
Support selectable evidence modes (`latest` vs `latest-passing`) across readiness, promotion, stage-drill, and h2 drill suite flows for deterministic operator replay.
Calibrate rollback-policy thresholds from recent validation summaries and capture machine-readable calibration evidence for operator replay.
Execute supervised rollback auto-apply simulation with calibrated thresholds and emit a unified evidence artifact verifying rollback trigger and Eve-safe shadow restoration.
Add an executable H2 closeout gate that validates H2-specific evidence artifacts (drill suite, threshold calibration, supervised rollback simulation) before promotion to H3.
Add a single-command H2 closeout runner that executes calibration + supervised rollback simulation + H2 closeout validation and emits one consolidated manifest.
Add a gated horizon promotion command that advances H2 to completed and H3 to active only when closeout evidence passes, with optional dry-run support.
Add a single-command H2 promotion runner that executes run:h2-closeout then promote:horizon using pinned closeout-run evidence for deterministic advancement to H3.
Enforce progressive horizon goal runway checks so each promotion can require the next horizon to carry more planned actions than the current horizon.
Harden runtime durability boundaries with persistent queue/replay semantics for cross-lane dispatch recovery.
Expand policy-router guardrails with stricter failure-class-to-action mappings and deterministic fallback contracts.
Implement capability execution safety envelopes with explicit timeout/resource budgets and auditable denials.
Add memory durability verification suite for crash/restart recovery and cross-lane consistency checks.
Create long-window soak validation for H3 policy and durability changes with explicit SLO drift alarms.
Introduce staged emergency rollback rehearsals for H3 changes with operator-ready evidence bundles.
Pin versioned UnifiedDispatchResult contract metadata and propagate through audit logs.
Add static scan gate blocking legacy Eve/Hermes adapter ingress outside unified dispatch allowlists.
Publish H4 unified dispatch contract documentation and conformance fixtures.
Emit compact single-line JSON from unified-dispatch CLI for JSONL evidence pipelines.
Tenant isolation model: optional envelope tenantId, tenant-scoped unified memory keys, per-tenant capability chat policy maps, and strict-tenant preflight.
Region-aware deterministic routing (routerRegionId vs envelope regionId) with primary/fallback swap on mismatch; WAL attempt records and replay carry tenantId/regionId.
Remediation playbook dry-run script emitting bounded operator manifest; tenant isolation validation wired into validate:all.
Extend soak and evidence summaries with explicit multi-tenant and multi-region drill dimensions.
Optional tenant-scoped audit log partitioning and retention policy hooks.
Add operator drill for region-misaligned routing with explicit evidence artifact and gate in validate:all or evidence-summary.
Cross-tenant leak regression harness for memory list and capability summarize_state under concurrent tenants.
Optional: extend region drill to explicit @cursor/@hermes passthrough swap cases and WAL correlation checks.
H5 closeout: machine gate for H5 evidence bundle (region drill v2, tenant isolation, soak dimensions) and optional horizon promotion to completed.
Post-H5: define next program horizon (H6) goals in HORIZON_STATUS and goalPolicies when product scope is ready.
Optional partitionId (or equivalent) on UnifiedMessageEnvelope with propagation through dispatch result, durable WAL, replay CLI, and audit logs; backward compatible when unset.
Extend soak and evidence summaries with partition drill dimensions and diversity drift alarms consistent with H5 tenant/region patterns.
Operator drill and machine gate for partition-scoped dispatch evidence (manifest + validate:all hook) mirroring H5 region drill rigor.
H6 closeout: consolidate partition evidence bundle validation and document promote:horizon H5→H6 path with H5->H6 goal policy checks.
Optional: after promote:horizon marks H5 completed, set activeHorizon to H6 and seed H7 or product-specific nextActions when scope is ready.
Define H7 program goals (observability, SLO contracts, or product-specific) and align goalPolicies H6->H7 with evidence gates.
Optional: extend horizon-closeout / evidence-summary for H6→H7 promotion path when H7 scope is locked.

H1.summary: Operationalization baseline closed with passing unified CI, artifact upload reliability, and downloaded artifact verification workflow.

H2.summary: Canary/majority drills are automated, evidence selection mode is configurable, threshold calibration and supervised rollback simulation are executable, H2-specific closeout evidence is machine-validated, one-command closeout and promotion runners are available, horizon advancement can consume pinned closeout-run evidence, and progressive goal-runway gates can require larger next-horizon scope before promotion.

H3.summary: Dispatch durable WAL with replay closure, atomic and dual-write file memory, policy-gated fallback classes, capability execution timeout, soak drift summarization, and emergency rollback rehearsal manifests are implemented and covered by tests.

H4.summary: Versioned dispatch contract stamping, legacy ingress static scan in validate:all, contract documentation, and JSONL-friendly CLI output are in place.

H5.summary: Multi-tenant and multi-region scale slice closed: tenant-scoped memory and capability policy, region-aware routing, WAL replay parity, remediation dry-run, region drill v2, partition drill, validate:h5-evidence-bundle and validate:h6-closeout in validate:all.

H6.summary: Federation/partition evidence program active: partitionId, soak partition dimensions, h6-partition-drill, h6-closeout wrapper; h6-action-1..5 completed in-repo. Run promote:horizon H5→H6 with pinned closeout when advancing production status.

H7.summary: Next program horizon placeholder: observability/SLO hardening or product-specific goals; see docs/H7_PROGRAM.md and h7-action-* nextActions.

history.note: Manifest policy gate, operator merge-bundle verification, and horizon status schema gate implemented.
Stage promotion readiness gate added for cutover advancement decisions.
Promotion orchestration path added to gate readiness + apply stage in a single operator command.
Unified CI run 24959459587 passed fully and downloaded artifact set was locally verified for merge-bundle and stage-promotion readiness.
H1 closeout gate implemented and passing; active horizon advanced to H2 with explicit kickoff actions.
H2 initiated with canary/majority drill and rollback-policy validation actions.
Canary drill action completed; executing machine-evaluable auto-rollback policy gate for sustained SLO violations.
Unified stage drill executor added so one command runs promotion gating and auto-rollback policy evaluation with combined evidence output.
Added H2 drill suite runner to execute canary hold, majority hold, and rollback-simulation drills with a unified suite report artifact.
Added evidence-selection mode controls (`latest`, `latest-passing`) across promotion/readiness/drill flows to support deterministic replay against either strict newest or newest passing evidence.
Added rollback threshold calibration and supervised rollback simulation commands with machine-readable evidence outputs and test coverage for calibrated forcing + Eve-safe shadow restoration checks.
Added H2 closeout evidence validation for horizon-scoped required artifacts and a dedicated validate:h2-closeout command to gate H2->H3 readiness checks.
Added run:h2-closeout orchestrator to execute calibration + supervised rollback simulation + H2 closeout validation in one command and emit consolidated manifest evidence.
Added promote:horizon command to gate horizon advancement on closeout evidence and atomically update HORIZON_STATUS with dry-run support.
Added run:h2-promotion orchestrator to execute run:h2-closeout and promote:horizon in one command with pinned closeout-run handoff evidence.
Added progressive horizon goal-runway gate (`check:progressive-horizon-goals`) and optional promotion enforcement flags so each promotion can require larger next-horizon planning scope.
Added goal policy profiles and tagged H3 action runway so horizon promotion can enforce both runway growth and required capability categories.
Added goal-policy coverage gate for future horizon transitions and promotion enforcement flags so operators can require policy-backed progression beyond the immediate transition.
Added goal-policy readiness-audit gate integration so promotion flows can require both transition coverage checks and matrix-based readiness audits before advancement.

Closed H3 durability slice: durable dispatch WAL, replay CLI, atomic and dual-write memory, fallback failure-class gate, capability timeout, soak summarizer, emergency rollback rehearsal script, and shared dispatch runtime builder.
Closed H4 contract slice: UNIFIED_DISPATCH_CONTRACT stamping, legacy dispatch entrypoint scan in CI validate:all, H4 contract doc, and compact JSON CLI output for evidence tooling.

H5 core slice landed: tenantId/regionId on envelopes and WAL, tenant-scoped memory keys and capability execution records, routerRegionId region failover swap, per-tenant capability chat env maps, strict tenant preflight, remediation-playbook-dry-run and validate:h5-tenant-isolation in validate:all; seeded h5-action-4 and h5-action-5 for follow-on work.

Completed h5-action-4 and h5-action-5: soak-simulate cycles tenant/region CLI args; summarize-soak-jsonl emits drillDimensions and diversity drift alarms; summarize-evidence includes soakDrillDimensions; appendDispatchAuditLog supports tenant-partitioned paths and max-bytes rotation with env UNIFIED_DISPATCH_AUDIT_TENANT_PARTITION and UNIFIED_DISPATCH_AUDIT_MAX_BYTES_BEFORE_ROTATE.

Completed h5-action-6 and h5-action-7: region misalignment drill script wired into validate:all; cross-tenant memory list isolation vitest harness; seeded h5-action-8 for extended region/WAL drill coverage.
Completed h5-action-8: region drill v2 (default + @cursor + @hermes), temp WAL correlation validation, dispatch_complete WAL correlation fields; seeded h5-action-9 for H5 closeout gate.

Completed h5-action-9: added scripts/validate-h5-evidence-bundle.mjs (horizon-closeout manifest, soak tenant/region diversity checks, region drill v2 + rollback + remediation artifacts) and npm run validate:h5-evidence-bundle in validate:all; seeded h5-action-10 for post-H5 program definition.

Completed h5-action-10: introduced H6 in horizon tooling (scripts/horizon-constants.mjs), docs/H6_PROGRAM.md, H5->H6 in docs/GOAL_POLICIES.json and goalPolicies here, horizonStates.H6 planned, h6-action-1..4 planned. Renamed evidence bundle script to validate-h5-evidence-bundle.mjs; validate:h5-closeout now runs validate-horizon-closeout for H5→H6; validate:all uses validate:h5-evidence-bundle.

Completed h6-action-1: optional partitionId on UnifiedMessageEnvelope; dispatchUnifiedMessage applies dispatchDefaults.defaultPartitionId; WAL attempt/complete and orphan replay carry partitionId; unified-dispatch CLI --partition-id and env UNIFIED_DISPATCH_DEFAULT_PARTITION_ID; audit log top-level partitionId; tests extended.

Completed h6-action-2: soak-simulate passes --partition-id per tenant/region cycle; summarize-soak-jsonl and summarize-evidence emit partitions in drillDimensions/soakDrillDimensions; drift alarm soak_low_partition_drill_diversity; validate-h5-evidence-bundle requires ≥2 non-_none partition keys in validation-summary soakDrillDimensions.

Completed h6-action-3: scripts/h6-partition-drill.mjs (two partition dispatches, WAL attempt/complete partitionId correlation), npm run run:h6-partition-drill in validate:all, validate-h5-evidence-bundle requires latest h6-partition-drill-*.json schemaVersion h6-partition-drill-v1 and pass true.

Completed h6-action-4: scripts/validate-h6-closeout.mjs emits h6-closeout-*.json (schemaVersion h6-closeout-v1, closeout H5→H6, wraps latest passing h5-closeout-*.json); npm run validate:h6-closeout in validate:all; notes for promote:horizon --goal-policy-key H5->H6 and GOAL_POLICIES.json.

Completed h6-action-5: activeHorizon set to H6; H5 marked completed in horizonStates; H7 planned with h7-action-1..2; H6->H7 in docs/GOAL_POLICIES.json and goalPolicies; horizon tooling extended to H7 (scripts/horizon-constants.mjs, validate-horizon-status regex, validate-horizon-closeout npm run matcher).
